evidenceSnippetOriginal: Microsoft Copilot Chat (Basic) is an AI-powered productivity tool. It provides you with a simple chat experience in web browsers such as Microsoft Edge. After login with your CUHK login, your chat data will be protected and would not be stored by Microsoft to protect privacy.
evidenceLocator: ITSC Copilot Chat Basic page, main description
